title: EQ - Select a value, put the app in background, return - the selected value stays
scenario: EQ setting does not persist after backgrounding and returning to the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
4. Press the Home button or swipe up to put the app in the background.
5. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app (e.g., tap the app icon or switch back via the app switcher).
6. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
7. Observe the currently selected EQ value.
8. Repeat steps 2–7 for each remaining EQ value: Flat, Bright, and Custom EQ.
expected: The selected EQ value persists after the app is backgrounded and then reopened. For each EQ value tested (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ), the same value remains selected upon returning to the Equalizer screen.
